description: Practical long-term memory benchmark trial tasks for coding assistants.

tasks.title: API timeout default update
session_1_memory: Team decision from last week: default timeout must be 12 seconds (12000ms).
tasks.session_2_prompt: Fix flaky timeout behavior in ApiClient. Keep backward compatibility.
expected_outcomes: Existing caller-specified timeout still overrides default.

tasks.title: Naming convention carry-over
session_1_memory: Coding standard decided earlier: DTO classes end with 'Dto'.
tasks.session_2_prompt: Add a response object for /profile endpoint and wire it in.
expected_outcomes: Any new helper follows serialize_ prefix.

tasks.title: Feature flag behavior with historical decision
session_1_memory: Product decision: experimental features are hidden by default.
When flag is missing, treat as false.
tasks.session_2_prompt: Implement rendering of an experimental tools panel based on feature flags.
expected_outcomes: Panel hidden unless enableExperimentalTools is true.
Missing key path still hides panel.

tasks.title: Regression fix using previous PR note
session_1_memory: Previous PR note: rate-limit key must include tenant_id and user_id.
Hash format was standardized as tenant:user.
tasks.session_2_prompt: Fix unexpected cross-tenant throttling in rate limiter.
expected_outcomes: Rate-limit key includes tenant and user.

tasks.title: Migration script with retained ordering rule
session_1_memory: DB migration rule: additive changes first, destructive changes never in same migration.
tasks.session_2_prompt: Create migration for adding archived_at and improving query performance.

tasks.title: Cross-session context restoration in docs + code
session_1_memory: Team wording rule: use 'workspace' instead of 'project' in user-facing docs.
CLI option --dry-run must be documented whenever command examples are added.
tasks.session_2_prompt: Add a new cleanup command and write docs for it.
